sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23847" key="deka/mucos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκά-μυξος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23847.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with ten wicks,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λύχνος</foreign> Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cultes Egyptiens</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0402.tlg001:235" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">235</biblScope> </bibl> (Delos, <date TEIform="date">ii B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
